about.title: About Us
about.heading: Organization
about.description: Greensprout – Smart Solutions for Green Future. Developing AGRISOLARBOT, a Multifunctional Smart Farming Vehicle.
about.heroDesc: AGRISOLARBOT is a single intelligent vehicle that performs multiple agricultural operations efficiently. It is built on an ESP32-Based Smart Control, is Solar + Battery Powered, and acts as a complete Smart & Sustainable Farming Solution.
about.visionDesc: Performs multiple agricultural operations in one system. Controlled via mobile application. Solar-powered with battery backup. Works in multiple field conditions. Simple, flexible, efficient.
about.visionDesc2: By integrating the seed mechanism, weed cutter, cultivator, and sprayer, it removes the need for multiple machines, drastically reducing time consumption and cost inefficiency.
about.iotDesc: ESP32-based Smart Control system managed via smartphone.
about.sustainableDesc: Eco-friendly system suitable for small & medium farms.
about.impactDesc: Reduces manpower requirement and improves productivity
about.readyDesc: One vehicle → Multiple operations. Cost-effective. High efficiency. Smart farming ready.
about.innovationDesc: Runs on reliable renewable energy without toxic emissions
about.visionStatement: A single intelligent vehicle that performs multiple agricultural operations efficiently. Solar + Battery Powered. ESP32-Based Smart Control. Mobile App Controlled. Smart & Sustainable Farming Solution.
about.missionHeading: Greensprout – Smart Solutions for Green Future
about.missionDesc: One vehicle → Multiple operations. We are eliminating the reliance on multiple isolated machines by building a singular, highly efficient smart farming solution.
about.sustainableInnovationDesc: Optimizes use of resources while supporting sustainable farming.
about.smartAutomationDesc: Controlled via mobile application using an ESP32-based integrated platform.
about.energyDesc: Allows the machine to continuously operate without hardwired electricity.
about.laborDesc: Saves vast amounts of operational time through multi-tasking.

problem.heading: Current Limitations in Farming
problem.desc: Traditional farming models introduce significant overhead and inefficiencies that hinder farm growth.
problem.barriersDesc: These key factors drastically reduce efficiency and productivity in traditional setups.
problem.laborDesc: Farmers are forced to purchase and maintain separate equipment for ploughing, seeding, weeding, and spraying. This creates a fragmented and unmanageable inventory.
problem.fuelDesc: Without a multi-tasking approach, transitioning between different manual machines or single-use tractors burns incredible amounts of operational time.
problem.irrigationDesc: Funding fuel, repairs, and individual maintenance cycles for multiple separate machines leads directly to massive cost inefficiencies.
problem.automationDesc: A complete lack of a single intelligent vehicle that combines smart farming tech with physical operations. Farming tasks remain disjointed.
problem.solutionDesc: Performs multiple agricultural operations in one system. Simple, flexible, efficient.

solution.heading: AGRISOLARBOT
solution.subtitle: A Multifunctional Smart Farming Vehicle
solution.desc: A single intelligent vehicle that performs multiple agricultural operations efficiently. Replaces multiple machines to solve cost inefficiency and time consumption.
solution.platformDesc: Performs multiple agricultural operations in one system. Controlled via mobile application. Solar-powered with battery backup. Works in multiple field conditions. Simple, flexible, efficient.
solution.whyDesc: One vehicle → Multiple operations. Cost-effective. High efficiency. Smart farming ready.
solution.envDesc: Utilizes a clean Solar + Battery approach, removing harmful diesel dependency.
solution.costDesc: Replaces multiple separate machines, solving major cost inefficiencies.
solution.effDesc: Saves time through multi-tasking and optimizes use of resources.
solution.comparisonDesc: A direct comparison highlighting the shift to multipurpose efficiency
solution.readyDesc: A single intelligent vehicle that performs multiple agricultural operations efficiently.

team.heading: Team Members
team.desc: The developers behind AGRISOLARBOT – A Multifunctional Smart Farming Vehicle.
team.leadershipDesc: Greensprout – Smart Solutions for Green Future
team.mentorDesc: Sakthi Navaneethan B (Department of Agricultural Engineering)
team.projectDesc1: AGRISOLARBOT is a single intelligent vehicle that performs multiple agricultural operations efficiently. Built entirely with multipurpose functionality in mind. It is Solar + Battery Powered, features an ESP32-Based Smart Control framework, and acts as a complete Smart & Sustainable Farming Solution.
team.projectDesc2: The problem statement we attacked addressed fundamental constraints in traditional farming: Multiple machines required, severe time consumption, cost inefficiency, and a lack of integrated systems. Our solution performs multiple agricultural operations in one system that works in multiple field conditions.
team.projectDesc3: Impact & Benefits: Optimizes use of resources safely, reduces manpower requirement cleanly, and saves time through multi-tasking. It is Eco-friendly, suitable for small & medium farms, works perfectly in remote areas, and enhances agricultural automation entirely.
team.joinDesc: One vehicle → Multiple operations. Cost-effective. High efficiency. Smart farming ready.
team.industryDesc: Greensprout – Smart Solutions for Green Future

featuresPage.heading: Key Functionalities
featuresPage.desc: Performs multiple agricultural operations in one system. Controlled via mobile application. Solar-powered with battery backup.
featuresPage.suiteDesc: A single intelligent vehicle that performs multiple agricultural operations efficiently.
featuresPage.ploughDesc: Soil preparation — loosens & aerates soil flawlessly.

featuresPage.weedDesc: Removes unwanted plants safely and efficiently.
featuresPage.irrigDesc: Optimizes use of resources safely across conditions.
featuresPage.solarFeatDesc: Eco-friendly, sustainable energy driving all units.

featuresPage.precisionDesc: Brings the power of an ESP32-Based Smart Control to the field.
